deviations.description: Dotfiles tree edits were auto-committed by an external background process outside this agent's control
deviations.reason: The dotfiles repo has an unrelated auto-commit mechanism (commit e6590fd 'checkpoint: auto-commit before update', authored ~2 minutes after the edits landed) that snapshotted 5 of the 6 edited dotfiles files into a commit. This agent never ran git commit in the dotfiles tree; the plan's instruction to 'leave dotfiles-repo edits uncommitted for user review' could not be honored for those 5 files because an external process committed them before this agent's final verification pass. The 6th file (dotfiles CLAUDE.md) remains uncommitted.
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: dotfiles auto-commit — see summary User-Action Summary)*
